canonical_diagnostic_rows.non_implication: This IE3 recovery result does not validate production bayesfilter code, does not justify DPF-HMC or banking-readiness claims, and does not upgrade replicated PF summaries into a statistically supported ranking or convergence proof.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.repair_trigger: Re-open IE3 if the schema stops carrying PF uncertainty fields, EDH special-case tolerances fail, or the CPU-only manifest proof drifts.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.why_not_validation: The row is controlled-fixture evidence only and does not instantiate real target posterior validation.

canonical_diagnostic_rows.non_implication: IE4 synthetic affine-flow checks validate only closed-form affine pushforward-density, inverse-map, and Jacobian-sign parity on deterministic clean-room fixtures. They do not validate nonlinear flow integration, solver stability, PF-PF filtering correctness, production bayesfilter code, real DPF-HMC targets, posterior quality, banking use, model-risk use, or production readiness.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.why_not_validation: The row is controlled-fixture evidence only and does not instantiate real target posterior validation.

canonical_diagnostic_rows.non_implication: IE4 PF-PF algebra parity checks validate only closed-form proposal-density, Jacobian-sign, unnormalized corrected-log-weight, and normalized-weight parity on deterministic affine clean-room fixtures. They do not validate nonlinear flow integration, solver stability, filtering correctness, production bayesfilter code, real DPF-HMC targets, posterior quality, banking use, model-risk use, or production readiness.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.why_not_validation: The row is controlled-fixture evidence only and does not instantiate real target posterior validation.

canonical_diagnostic_rows.non_implication: IE5 soft-resampling diagnostics validate only deterministic two-particle relaxed-target expectation arithmetic for selected affine and nonlinear test functions. They do not validate categorical resampling law preservation, unbiasedness for nonlinear observables, posterior equivalence, production bayesfilter code, banking use, model-risk use, or production readiness.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.why_not_validation: The row is controlled-fixture evidence only and does not instantiate real target posterior validation.

canonical_diagnostic_rows.non_implication: IE5 Sinkhorn diagnostics validate only finite-budget marginal residuals for a small deterministic regularized transport fixture. They do not validate exact unregularized OT equivalence, exact EOT equivalence at finite epsilon/iteration budget, posterior equivalence, production bayesfilter code, banking use, model-risk use, or production readiness.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.why_not_validation: The row is controlled-fixture evidence only and does not instantiate real target posterior validation.

canonical_diagnostic_rows.non_implication: IE6 learned-OT diagnostics were deferred because no approved pre-existing teacher/student artifact with provenance was available. This deferral does not validate or invalidate learned OT, neural OT, surrogate-map quality, posterior quality, production bayesfilter code, banking use, model-risk use, or production readiness.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.why_not_validation: The diagnostic is deferred with a recorded evidence gap, not validation or method failure.

canonical_diagnostic_rows.non_implication: IE7 fixed-scalar value-gradient diagnostics validate only same-scalar, finite-difference, repeatability, and fixed-target leapfrog/energy-smoke checks on a deterministic clean-room fixture. They do not validate HMC correctness, DPF-HMC correctness, posterior/reference agreement, tuning readiness beyond controlled-fixture eligibility, production bayesfilter code, banking use, model-risk use, or production readiness.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.why_not_validation: IE7 is a fixed-scalar value-gradient gate only and does not validate HMC correctness or posterior agreement.

canonical_diagnostic_rows.non_implication: The DPF monograph implementation-evidence program provides clean-room controlled-fixture and governance evidence only. It does not validate real DPF-HMC targets, DSGE or MacroFinance posterior inference, banking use, model-risk use, production bayesfilter code, or production readiness.
canonical_diagnostic_rows.why_not_validation: IE8 intentionally ran no posterior sensitivity; no posterior validation is claimed.

non_implication: The DPF monograph implementation-evidence program provides clean-room controlled-fixture and governance evidence only. It does not validate real DPF-HMC targets, DSGE or MacroFinance posterior inference, banking use, model-risk use, production bayesfilter code, or production readiness.
post_run_red_team_note: The strongest reason not to over-read this closeout is that it aggregates clean-room controlled fixtures and one deferred learned-OT gap; it does not instantiate real DPF-HMC posterior targets or production code paths.
posterior_sensitivity_execution_reason: No posterior sensitivity executed by default; current artifacts do not authorize real DPF-HMC, HMC-chain, DSGE, MacroFinance, or posterior validation runs.

source_support_ceiling: Program-level source-support ceiling: bibliography-spine support unless a row explicitly records a stronger reviewed-source artifact. IE1 did not identify reviewed local DPF source summaries, so this program does not upgrade source provenance to paper-reviewed support.
